name: Colorful Vegetable Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 medium size head red leaf lettuce (diced)
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the lettuce leaves and trim any excess, rinsing well in cool water. Spin dry or pat with a paper towel to remove moisture.
2. Tear the lettuce into bite-sized pieces and place in a large salad bowl.
3. Add sliced radishes, carrot, bell pepper (green, red, and yellow), chopped green onions, and alfalfa sprouts.
4. Drizzle with creamy tofu dressing and toss gently to combine all ingredients.
5. Sprinkle toasted pine nuts on top before serving.
